title: Caesar's Secret
description: An intercepted NexusCorp transmission reads: `JHLZHY PZUVA ZLJBYL`. The message was encoded with a simple Caesar cipher. Shift value was noted as ROT-7. Decode the message.
hint: ROT-7 means shift each letter back by 7 positions in the alphabet.

title: Base64 Decoder
description: A hidden file on the CHIMERA node contains an encoded string: `Q0hJTUVSQS1LRVk6IEFscGhhLTg0Ny1YWVo=`. Decode it to find the embedded key.
hint: This is standard base64 encoding. Use `echo '<string>' | base64 -d` to decode.

title: XOR Master
description: A file has been XOR-encrypted with a single-byte key. The ciphertext hex is: `1b 37 37 33 31 36 3f 78 3e 27 33 34 36 3e 7f 3e`. Known plaintext: the message starts with 'Cooking'. Recover the key byte.
hint: XOR the first byte of ciphertext (0x1b) with the first byte of known plaintext 'C' (0x43). The result is your key.

title: Hash Collision
description: The NexusCorp password database stores MD5 hashes. The hash `5f4dcc3b5aa765d61d8327deb882cf99` was found for an admin account. Use your knowledge of common password hashes to identify the plaintext password.
hint: This is one of the most common MD5 hashes ever seen. It's for a very obvious password.
